Game.Name: Shin Kidou Senki Gundam W - Endless Duel (Japan)
Game.plot: Shin Kidou Senshi Gundam W: Endless Duel is an Action game, developed by Natsume and published by Bandai,which was released in Japan in 1996.Cheat: Use Super Moves in mid-air (Specific Units)This glitch applies for the following Units: HEAVYARMS, SANDROCK, WINGZERO, MERCURIOUS, and TALLGEESE. Normally, these Units cannot perform any super moves in the air or while jumping. This can be bypassed, however, by jumping and then inputting the command for the super (Usually: down, down-forward, forward x2) plus BOOSTER (any two attack buttons simultaneously except Buttons L and R) instead of pressing just one button! The Unit will perform the super but still be in the "standing-on-solid-ground" animation!
